_publications._publicationTitle: Local low-dose lovastatin delivery improves the bone-healing defect caused by Nf1 loss of function in osteoblasts.

_contextSnippet: ...both callus bridging cortices BMD (877.7 ± 69.0 versus 799.3 ± 94.4, p = .018) and callus BMD (1052.4 ± 53.1 versus 1000.8 ± 56.3, p = .019) were significantly decreased...
details: Significantly decreased callus bridging cortices BMD (799.3 ± 94.4 vs 877.7 ± 69.0, p=0.018) and callus BMD (1000.8 ± 56.3 vs 1052.4 ± 53.1, p=0.019)
